post.topic: Essential Claude API Tips for Developers
post.hook: 4 Claude API tricks that will level up your development game 🚀
post.caption:
4 Claude API tricks that will level up your development game 🚀

Save this carousel for your next Claude API project.

slides.title: Smart Cache Control
slides.body: Use cache_control to save tokens and speed up responses for repeated content like system prompts.

slides.title: Structured JSON Output
slides.body: Force consistent JSON responses using the new output_config.format parameter instead of prompt engineering.
slides.code_snippet:
response = client.messages.create(
    model="claude-3-sonnet-20240229",
    messages=[{"role": "user", 
              "content": "Extract data"}],
    extra_body={"output_config": 
               {"format": "json"}}
)

slides.title: Async Batch Processing
slides.body: Process multiple requests efficiently with async to avoid blocking your application thread.
slides.code_snippet:
import asyncio

async def process_batch(prompts):
    tasks = [client.messages.create(
        model="claude-3-haiku-20240307",
        messages=[{"role": "user", 
                  "content": p}]) for p in prompts]
    return await asyncio.gather(*tasks)

slides.title: Smart Error Handling
slides.body: Implement exponential backoff for rate limits and proper error catching for production apps.
slides.code_snippet:
from anthropic import RateLimitError
import time

try:
    response = client.messages.create(...)
except RateLimitError:
    time.sleep(2 ** attempt)
    # retry logic
